source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/HAD1717MC/EMC 접수자료 231219/5. Test plan/HAD1717MC, MG Detector Test plan 231220.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: EMC test plan contents for Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines test facility, equipment identification, intended use, EMC criteria, configurations, power input, grounding, accessories, and test setup references for detector EMC testing.
keyPoints: Test facility is Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
Product is identified as Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector, models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
Intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, excluding mammography and direct cardiac application.
EMISSIONS compliance class and group are Group 1 Class A.
ME equipment power input is 100 - 240 V~, 50/60 Hz with DC 12 V output.

evidence.claim: The test facility is Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. 155 & 159, Osan-Ro, Mohyeon-Myeon, Cheoin-Gu, Yongin-Si, Gyeonggi-Do 16885 KOREA, REPUBLIC OF

evidence.claim: The ME equipment product name is Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name : Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector

evidence.claim: The identified models are HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
The detector converts absorbed X-rays to digital data and delivers it to a PC through an access point or main cable.
evidence.evidenceText: The detector converts absorbed x-ray to digital data, deliver it to PC via AP (Access Point) or main cable and PC converts the delivered digital data into images to show it on the monitor.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital X Ray Detector Data Transmission

evidence.claim: The intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: The detector is not to be used for mammography or direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector Contraindications

evidence.claim: One sample of each model is to be tested.
evidence.evidenceText: Number of samples to be tested : 1 EA of each model (HAD1717MC)

evidence.claim: Software used for detector testing includes XAS version 1.0.0.0 and HnViewer version 1.0.0.0.
evidence.evidenceText: Software version : Software for detector testing. 1) XAS : 1.0.0.0 2) HnViewer : 1.0.0.0

evidence.claim: The firmware version of the tested sample is 1.0.
EMISSIONS compliance class and group are Group 1 Class A.
evidence.evidenceText: IMMUNITY TEST LEVELS for each IMMUNITY test and EMISSIONS compliance class and group... Group 1 Class A

evidence.claim: Immunity pass/fail criteria include normal operation when required and consistent connection to power supply during EMC testing.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation normally when operation is required Connected consistently to POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.

evidence.claim: The ME equipment is tested as table-top equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: ME EQUIPMENT will be tested as table-top.

evidence.claim: Power input is 100 - 240 V~, 50/60 Hz and output is DC 12 V.
Protective earth connection is made by connecting the Earth GND terminal of the Power Supply Box to facility ground with a cable.
evidence.evidenceText: Connect the Earth GND terminal of the Power Supply Box to the facility ground securely with a cable

evidence.claim: Detector and PC data transmission follows the Ethernet standard.
evidence.evidenceText: Data is transmitted and received between the Detector and the PC in accordance with the Ethernet standard.

evidence.claim: Applicable standards and test methods are referenced in Attachment 8 but not listed in the provided text.
evidence.evidenceText: Refer to Attach 8. Applicable Standards and Test Methods

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not explicitly stated in the source text; numeric dates appear only in the file path or filename.
Document revision or version is not provided; software and firmware versions are present but are not document revisions.
Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text despite authoritySignal metadata indicating FDA.
Applicable standards and test methods are referenced as an attachment, but the actual standards list and dates are not present in the provided source text.
Sample count evidence says '1 EA of each model' but parenthetical text only shows HAD1717MC.
